title: Mark
description: An academic mark with per-record teacher ownership. White paper §5, ADR-008. Cloud-wins arbitrates ONLY a true same-mark cross-node conflict; it never silently overwrites normal offline entry.

id.description: Stable identity of THIS mark (student×subject×sequence). Edits keep the id and bump revision.

revision.description: Monotonic revision per edit; used with revision_parent to detect true conflicts vs. linear history.

revision_parent.description: The revision this edit was based on. If two nodes share a parent and diverge, that is a true conflict for cloud arbitration.

owner_teacher_id.description: Teacher of record who owns this mark; their offline entry is authoritative absent a true conflict.

coefficient.description: Subject weighting for this pathway; applied by the promotion engine.

published.description: Students/parents see a mark only when published.
